theme.design_system: Tailwind CSS v3 + custom inline styles

responsive.note: App.tsx uses 0 responsive breakpoints (sm:/md:/lg:/xl:). Fixed-width layout optimized for 1000x1050 Tauri window. May not render well on very small browser viewports.
issues: No responsive breakpoints - fixed layout only suitable for desktop width (1000px+)

violations: No aria-label attributes found on interactive elements
No role attributes for custom interactive components
Icon-only buttons (lucide-react) have no accessible text labels
positive: Color contrast appears adequate (white text on dark zinc/gray backgrounds)
Toast notification system provides user feedback

toast_system.behavior: Slides in from top-right, auto-dismisses after 3s, manual close available
toast_system.note: Toast system present but 19 legacy alert()/prompt() calls still remain in App.tsx
